pr.title: refactor(evaluators): split integrations.rs into 7 per-tab files
pr.body:
## Summary
- Split the macro-bundled stubs in `crates/evaluators/src/integrations.rs` into one explicit file per integration tab: `analytics.rs`, `search_console.rs`, `link_metrics.rs`, `custom_search.rs`, `custom_extraction.rs`, `custom_javascript.rs`, `ai.rs`.
- Each new file carries a short module doc comment naming its blocking dependency (GA4 OAuth, GSC OAuth, Moz/Majestic/Ahrefs, user-authored slots, render-worker JS bridge, AI provider) and a minimal test asserting empty findings for an HTML page.
- Updated `lib.rs` module declarations and `phase1_evaluators()` registration to use the new module paths; deleted `integrations.rs`.

Implements slice C.7 of the gap-closure master design (`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-22-sf-clone-gap-closure-master-design.md`). The old `integrations.rs` file's own doc comment flagged it as a placeholder to be split once real implementations started landing.

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo test -p sf-evaluators` (166 passed, 0 failed)
- [x] `cargo fmt --check` (clean)
- [x] `cargo clippy -p sf-evaluators --all-targets -- -D warnings` (clean)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: sahiljani
